name: @influence/engine
description: Influence game engine — core game logic, state machine, agents

scripts.simulate: doppler run --project social-strategy-agent --config dev -- bun run src/simulate.ts
scripts.simulate:katana:grok:smoke: doppler run --project social-strategy-agent --config dev -- bun run src/simulate.ts --games 1 --players 4 --variant mingle --model-catalog katana:grok-4-3 --reasoning-policy low --game-timeout-sec 900 --llm-timeout-sec 120
scripts.test: doppler run --project social-strategy-agent --config dev -- bun test
scripts.test:watch: doppler run --project social-strategy-agent --config dev -- bun test --watch
scripts.test:mock: bun test src/__tests__/game-engine.test.ts src/__tests__/stream-listener.test.ts src/__tests__/goodbye-message.test.ts src/__tests__/simulation-instrumentation.test.ts src/__tests__/simulate-config.test.ts src/__tests__/canonical-events.test.ts src/__tests__/canonical-event-replay.test.ts src/__tests__/game-mcp.test.ts src/__tests__/llm-client.test.ts src/__tests__/agent-structured-output.test.ts src/__tests__/mingle-terminology.test.ts src/__tests__/named-alliances-state.test.ts src/__tests__/named-alliances-actions.test.ts src/__tests__/named-alliances-cadence.test.ts src/__tests__/named-alliances-context.test.ts src/__tests__/named-alliances-huddles.test.ts src/__tests__/named-alliances-integration.test.ts src/__tests__/house-interviewer-structured-output.test.ts
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint
